title: What we're launching?
lede: May 6th's milestone focused mostly on our agents. This milestone focuses on the way of working of agents & people — letting our customers embed agents in their day-to-day work with ease and trust.

tabs.title: Human & Agents collaboration
tabs.tagline: Where people and agents work side by side — on the same goals, in the same place, with shared context.

cards.title: Container / Initiatives
cards.description: A workspace dedicated to a specific shared goal. The home for agents and people working together, with shared context.

cards.title: Group chat
cards.description: Conversations where people and agents talk side by side — same place, same context.

cards.title: Notetaker
cards.description: Desktop app that records meetings without Zoom limitations. Brings an agent to the call with full context to take action items.

tabs.title: Ecosystem
tabs.tagline: Your agents, our agents, partner agents. Connect monday to the AI tools your teams already use.

cards.title: Bring your own agent
cards.description: Plug in 3rd-party agents (Claude, OpenAI, more) with full access to your monday context.

cards.title: Access monday from your AI tools
cards.description: Use monday from leading AI tools like Make — the platform meets your team where they already work.

tabs.title: Agents
tabs.tagline: Everything that makes our agents top-notch: collaboration, context, and a proactive sidekick.

cards.title: Collaboration on agents
cards.description: Tag and mention agents like teammates.

cards.title: Autosave & versioning
cards.description: Never lose work. Roll back to previous versions.

cards.title: Troubleshooting
cards.description: Cut the 7% of credits lost to bad runs. Diagnose and fix in place.

cards.title: Expanded artifacts
cards.description: Agents produce HTML, docs, and decks — not just chat replies.

cards.title: One-click MCP
cards.description: Connect to any MCP server in a single click.

cards.title: Context
cards.description: Agents understand who you are, your team, and where work stands — they navigate monday with your mindset.

cards.title: Sidekick
cards.description: Proactive in the context of your task. Produces artifacts (HTML, decks). Connects through integrations.

tabs.title: AI workflows
tabs.tagline: Agents embedded in the workflows people already use — with full control.

cards.title: Control of agents in workflows
cards.description: People stay in control of agents' inputs, outputs, and behavior — exactly what each agent is doing, end to end.

tabs.title: AI trust & governance
tabs.tagline: Visibility, permissions, and guardrails — so adoption is safe.

cards.title: Permissions & access
cards.description: Control what agents can access — both at the user and team level.

cards.title: Visibility to value
cards.description: Surface the value agents deliver — visible to admins and team members alike.

cards.title: Guardrails
cards.description: Boundaries that hold. Teams adopt agents with confidence.

demo.title: See it in motion.
demo.caption: Drop a video at /public/video/product-demo.mp4 to replace this.
